prompt: A dark anime gothic portrait of a young woman shown from the chest up, centered in the frame, with long layered silver-white hair in messy twin tails and loose strands falling over the shoulders. She wears two large black ribbon-and-lace hair ornaments, a black gothic dress with voluminous sleeves and delicate lace trim, black lace fingerless gloves, and a black leather choker with a buckle. Around her neck are 2 layered silver chain necklaces, one ending in a prominent cross pendant. Both hands are raised near her face making peace signs, one on each side, with black painted nails and a slightly playful, edgy pose. The background is a rich blood-red gradient with a dark, moody atmosphere, decorated with 5 visible black roses on thorny stems around the figure and dripping black shapes along the top edge, creating a dramatic gothic horror aesthetic. Use high-detail anime illustration, sharp linework, soft dramatic shading, glossy black fabrics, pale skin, strong red-and-black contrast, symmetrical composition, close-up framing, and an elegant but ominous mood.
